onboardingBetaWarning: Heavy development. Nothing is guaranteed: stability, your data, or outcomes.
onboardingBody: A free learning app built around knowledge maps (trees). Pick a language and accept the privacy policy to start.
onboardingLoginSigningInBanner: Connecting to the network… this can take a few seconds. Please don't close or reload the tab.
onboardingPrivacyText: Your progress is saved in this browser. On the web, clearing cookies or site data can erase it, a free account backs up and syncs your study history (encrypted). Public network features are optional; if you use them, your IP is visible to external servers.
onboardingRegisterCreatingBanner: Creating your account… this can take a few seconds. Please don't close or reload the tab.
onboardingRegisterTimeout: We couldn't confirm the account creation. The connection is taking too long. Check your internet and try again.
onboardingRegisterUsernameHint: Pick a name that identifies you online. You can rename it later from Profile.
onboardingRegisteredConfirmBody: Did you save your secret code? Without it you cannot sign in on another device or recover this account.
onboardingRegisteredNotSavedBody: You haven't saved your code yet. Without it you cannot sign in on another device or recover this account. Copy or download it first, or set a recovery passphrase.
onboardingRegisteredQrHint: Scan this sync QR from another device to sign in without typing.
onboardingRegisteredQrHintDesktop: Show this on your computer. Scan it from your phone to sign in without typing your password.
onboardingRegisteredQrHintMobile: On your other device choose “Scan sync QR” and point the camera at this code.
onboardingRegisteredSaveFirstHint: Copy or download the code (or set a recovery passphrase) before continuing.
onboardingRegisteredSubtitle: Save this code before you continue. You'll need it to sign in on other devices.
onboardingRegisteredPasswordSubtitle: Your password is ready. Export a sync key or set a recovery phrase. You can also do this later in Profile.
onboardingRegisteredPasswordSubtitleDesk: Your password is ready. Show the sync QR to your phone or download a sync key file.
onboardingRegisteredPasswordSubtitleMobi: Your password is ready. Export a sync key or set a recovery phrase. You can also do this later in Profile.
onboardingRegisteredPasswordOk: Your password is set. Optionally set up a backup below, then continue.
onboardingSessionSignInSub: Password, sync QR, or sync key file
onboardingSessionSkipSub: This browser only, back up in Profile so clearing site data does not erase your progress
onboardingSessionSubtitle: A free account backs up and syncs your progress. Pick a username to get started.
onboardingSessionSkipLaterHint: No account for now, progress stays in this browser only
onboardingSkipConfirmBody: Your progress will stay in this browser only. Clearing cookies or site data may erase it. You can create a free account later from Profile.
onboardingUsernameTakenSignIn: That username is already taken. If it's yours, sign in with your password.
onboardingNetworkAcceptNote: By continuing you accept the privacy policy and enable the recommended public network (Nostr relays). You can change or turn off Online later in Privacy & data.
onboardingLocalOnlyPromptBody: Arborito will be very limited: no online catalog, share codes, forums, sync, or publishing. To confirm, type localonly.
onboardingLocalOnlyConfirmBody: Arborito will be very limited: no online catalog, share codes, forums, sync, or publishing. Only trees on this device and manual import. You can enable the network later from Privacy & data.
onboardingNetworkHint: Operated by third parties; Arborito does not host your courses.
onboardingNetworkBundleHint: Use the recommended bundle so teachers and learners see the same course.
onboardingNetworkMinOne: Choose at least one server or turn off the public network.
onboardingNetworkOffWarn: Without a network connection there are no share codes, sync, or online catalog. You can enable the network later in Privacy & data.
